Wiki / Achievements & stats

Achievements, reviews & stats

195 achievements to chase, a procedural review system that reacts to how you run the shop, and a stats panel that tracks your whole empire.

Completion

195 achievements · 17 categories

Many achievements grant a cash bonus or a temporary income buff on unlock. Here's the full category breakdown.

Category Count Examples
Crazy Scenarios 20 Offbeat milestone combinations
Special Outcomes 19 Golden / swirled / decorated counts
Shake Milestones 17 Novice Blender → Shake Titan
Money Milestones 16 First C-Note → Billionaire
Flavor Combos 15 Classic Pairing, Neapolitan Master
Hidden Secrets 12 Easter-egg discoveries
Curious Quirks 12 Quirky play patterns
Countries 11 Going Global → World Domination
Legendary Milestones 10 Endgame feats (huge buffs)
Employees 10 Hiring milestones
Upgrades & Tech 10 Upgrade-level milestones
Random Events 10 Event participation
Flavors 9 Flavor Curious → Flavor Legend
Shop Extensions 8 Extension milestones
Time Played 6 Days-in-business milestones
Player Levels 6 Level milestones
Customer Ratings 4 Reputation milestones

You can pin a few achievements to keep their progress in view, and the panel has search + category filters to find what's left.

Reputation

Customer reviews

Reviews are procedurally generated (no AI) from a seeded RNG, written entirely from your real business metrics — so they shift as your shop changes, and each one keeps a single coherent mood.

How they're scored

Each review judges one or two of nine aspects — Overall, Quality, Speed, Friendliness, Variety, Value, Atmosphere, Presentation, Consistency — derived from wages, blend speed, flavor count, quality/presentation ratios, locations, and staff. Output is a whole-number 1–5★ rating.

The reviews panel

Shows your overall rating and a feed of dated reviews you can search and filter by aspect. Raise wages, add flavors, speed up blends, and grow locations to lift your scores — low ratings can trigger reputation events.

By the numbers

Stats & records

Tracked stats

  • Customer-rating gauge & 5-star reputation
  • Lifetime blends · days open · achievements · blend time
  • Special-blend rate & full outcome distribution
  • Empire progress: flavors / countries / locations / employees
  • Choice & auto event counts

Personal records

  • Peak income / second
  • Peak money held
  • Most blends in a session
  • Best special-blend streak
Levels & activitiesEarn achievements faster Tips & strategyOptimize your run
